description: Toggleable correction notes targeting known failure modes. Active notes are appended to the stage prompt as a CORRECTION NOTES section. v2: scene corrections are no longer gated by preset id (there are no more presets) — every scene correction with appliesTo:'scene' is always active. Iteration lever: bench failure -> activate/adjust a note -> re-bench.

corrections.failureMode: Model generates a different vehicle (generic white van) instead of the SNACKET EV
corrections.note: The vehicle must be IDENTICAL to IMAGE A: same micro-truck body, same flat roof, same raised gull-wing doors, same wheels and cab. Do not generate any other vehicle type, size or door configuration.

corrections.failureMode: Faucet taps in front of the center disc get erased, blended away, or repainted
corrections.note: The three faucet taps (dark wood-grip handles on chrome faucet bodies, exactly as in IMAGE A) are physical 3D objects mounted IN FRONT of the center disc. All three must remain fully visible and unmodified — same materials, same colors, same positions — overlapping whatever is printed on the disc.

corrections.failureMode: Client logo gets recolored, simplified or redrawn
corrections.note: Use the IMAGE B logo EXACTLY as provided: same colors, same proportions, same artwork. No color modifications, no stylistic reinterpretation, no added text.

corrections.failureMode: Replaced zones show remnants of SNACKET lettering mixed with the client logo
corrections.note: CRITICAL: every replaced zone must contain ZERO remnants of the word SNACKET or its icons. Fully remove the old mark before placing the new one — never blend old and new marks.

corrections.failureMode: Complex logos become illegible smudges at miniature scale
corrections.note: For small zones, if the IMAGE B logo has fine detail, render only its primary symbol or monogram at that scale so it stays crisp and legible.

corrections.failureMode: Branding pass invents a background scene instead of keeping the studio background
corrections.note: Keep the plain white studio background from IMAGE A. Do not add any scene, floor texture, people or environment — this image is a product shot of the branded EV only.

corrections.failureMode: Staff generated inside the EV or behind a service counter
corrections.note: NON-NEGOTIABLE: the SNACKET EV is not a food truck and has no interior service capacity. The EV Operator and Brand Ambassador must ALWAYS be standing on the ground, OUTSIDE the vehicle — never inside it, never behind a service counter, never framed within the service window opening. The service window opening shows only the vehicle's interior equipment — no person inside it, ever, regardless of venue or theme.

corrections.failureMode: Staff shown completely isolated with zero guests visible anywhere in the frame
corrections.note: Event guests/attendees must be visible in the scene near the EV activation area — staff should not appear alone with no attendees anywhere in the frame. Pose, gesture, and the specific form of interaction between staff and guests are NOT constrained — any natural, freely-chosen pose is acceptable, including staff simply standing near the EV with guests elsewhere in the scene.

corrections.failureMode: Staff turn to face the photographer and pose for a portrait instead of actively conversing with a nearby guest
corrections.note: The professional photographer's subject is the activation and its GUESTS — never the EV Operator or Brand Ambassador. Staff must NOT turn to face the photographer, look at the camera, or hold a posed stance. At all times, staff must be captured mid-conversation with a guest: eye contact, gestures, and attention all directed at that guest, not at the camera.

corrections.failureMode: LED floor posters missing, wrong size, or wrong placement
corrections.note: The 2 LED floor posters are free-standing on the floor (not wall-mounted), 26 inches wide by 88 inches tall, one on each side of the EV, flanking it symmetrically.

corrections.failureMode: Balloon arch colors do not match the client logo colors
corrections.note: CORRECTION: balloon arch colors must EXACTLY match the client logo colors in IMAGE B — no interpretation, exact color match.

corrections.failureMode: Light fixtures mounted on tripods/stands, or not visible on the floor, or wrong model, or wrong placement
corrections.note: The 4 Chauvet Freedom Par Q9 Wireless, Battery-Operated LED fixtures ALWAYS sit directly on the floor — never on a tripod or stand — each projecting its colored light upward from the floor. Exact placement: 2 fixtures at the step-and-repeat backdrop (one at each end), and 2 fixtures at the EV (one at each front corner of the vehicle).

corrections.failureMode: Bar stools rendered with wrong style
corrections.note: Each bar stool must be white tufted leather with a chrome pedestal base and chrome ring footrest — tall bar height, square tufted seat cushion, no backrest.

corrections.failureMode: The step-and-repeat's red carpet bleeds into other areas of the scene instead of staying in front of the backdrop only
corrections.note: The red carpet in front of the step-and-repeat backdrop stays scoped to that area only — it does not extend elsewhere in the scene. The EV-front carpet is a SEPARATE piece of the same material, placed only in front of the EV.

corrections.failureMode: Scene pass re-touches or corrupts the EV branding done in stage 1
corrections.note: The EV branding in IMAGE A is FINAL. Do not repaint, move, add or remove any logo on the vehicle. Reproduce the vehicle pixel-faithful including all its current branding.

corrections.failureMode: Output contains text overlays, borders or watermarks
corrections.note: No text overlays, no borders, no watermarks, no captions anywhere in the output image.
